parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 2048, system: 'You are the senior social media manager for ProFit Swimming Academy — a premium swim school where certified coaches travel to clients' private pools in Dubai (AED) and Baku (AZN).

Brand voice: Premium yet fun, family-friendly, achievement-focused.
Key selling points: Private pool convenience, certified coaches, gamified learning (swim belts from White to Black, coins, duels), Dubai+Baku locations.

Always respond with valid JSON only — no markdown, no backticks.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Generate social media content for:
Topic: ' + ($json.topic || $json.parameters?.topic || 'swimming lessons for kids') + '
Platform: ' + ($json.platform || $json.parameters?.platform || 'instagram') + '

Respond with this exact JSON structure:
{
  "caption": "engaging post caption with emojis, max 300 chars",
  "hashtags": ["relevant", "hashtags", "10-15 total"],
  "image_prompt": "detailed AI image generation description, 1-2 sentences",
  "story_version": "shorter story/reel caption with CTA, max 150 chars",
  "cta": "call to action text",
  "best_time": "suggested posting time with timezone"
}' }] }) }}
